You know, I just completed a sequence on House of the dragon and I was like, I would be torn between sitting at the monitors versus watching everybody do the work, because it was Like it was, everybody was doing everything so perfectly that I just was like, it wasn't it was all on the craft side of things to see it, like, all happening in front of my eyes was incredible.
